playbook.intent: Blind-running agent → fully observed: per-step OTEL traces, eval-in-prod sampling, drift detection, alerting, on-call runbook.
playbook.scope: Production agent goes from blind-running to fully observed: per-step OTEL traces, eval-in-prod sampling, drift detection on inputs/outputs/costs, alerting, and an on-call runbook.

success-criteria.criterion: Drift detection firing on planted shifts
Alerts route to the right channel with tier-approval gating

stage.name: Trace Wiring
stage.intent: Per-step OTEL traces with stable trajectory ids.

tasks.task: Instrument every tool call + LLM call

stage.decision-gate: Advance when traces resolve per-step end-to-end.

stage.name: Eval-in-Prod
stage.decision-gate: Advance when scores look stable on a known-good window.

stage.name: Drift Detection
stage.intent: Detect input, output, and cost drift before users do.
stage.decision-gate: Advance after planted-drift test fires correctly.

stage.name: On-Call
stage.intent: Read-only investigation default + runbook + approval gates.

tasks.task: Author runbook as tagged markdown steps

stage.decision-gate: Ship only when an end-to-end incident drill completes.

extra.value: ['Replacing existing APM — augments, not replaces', Building a vendor observability product]
[Existing production agent path, Logging endpoint with retention]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content agent-observability-drift-detection-rollout --format md, agent: faion get-content agent-observability-drift-detection-rollout --format context, json: faion get-content agent-observability-drift-detection-rollout --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
